_comment: Provenance manifest for COMMUNITY-extracted datasets, kept separate from data/official/manifest.json. GGG publishes no official skill-gem, support-gem, or base-item export, so these ids are sourced from reputable community game-data projects and clearly labelled as community (not official). See docs/research/14-development-implementation-plan.md and data/sources/community-links.json. Updated by scripts/fetch_community_data.py (fetched_at) and scripts/normalize_community_data.py (coverage/count).
disclaimer: Community-extracted data is accepted ONLY to resolve build ids and power .build export, with attribution and no bulk-republishing as site content. Underlying game data is (c) Grinding Gear Games.

datasets.license: Tooling MIT; gem data (c) Grinding Gear Games.
datasets.id_form: Metadata/Items/Gem(s)/SkillGem... (exact in-game .build path, taken per gem)
datasets.validation: gameId form cross-validated against GGG's official .build example (SkillGemEarthquake, SkillGemBoneshatter, SupportGemAftershock, SupportGemFastForward, SupportGemImpactShockwave).
known_gaps: Active skill gem ids only. Used to resolve build skill gem_id values and the .build exporter; not republished as a database page.

datasets.license: Tooling MIT; gem data (c) Grinding Gear Games.
datasets.id_form: Metadata/Items/Gem(s)/SupportGem... (exact in-game .build path, taken per gem)
known_gaps: Support skill gem ids only. Used to resolve build support gem_id values and the .build exporter.

datasets.license: RePoE tooling MIT (c) 2016 brather1ng; item data (c) Grinding Gear Games.
known_gaps: The official .build inventory_slots use a slot id + free-text hints (no base-item id), so this dataset is NOT consumed by .build export. It backs on-page exact base requirements only.
